General.Name: Cantor Equity Partners II, Inc.
General.Description: Cantor Equity Partners II, Inc., does not have significant operations. It intends to focus on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was formerly known as CF International Acquisition Corp. III. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in New York, New York.
General.Address: 110 East 59th Street, New York, NY, United States, 10022
